text.message: Why wouldn’t you trade with the person in last lol
I literally offered it on my turn and accepted on yours but all good
or block black road to the 3 to 1
Not trading the win. I’m way in last. Need to build
with the road you make more points
Sorry I didn’t have it with just the wood. Needed the full road
So couldn’t connect anyway. Would rather city
told you i had brick for you
Blue you had a road and didn’t give it to me lol
if you dont extend black wins next turn
he has the road on hand
